diagrams.description: This timeline traces the evolution of Advertising from ancient notice boards to AI‑driven real‑time personalization. Key milestones: ancient papyrus and painted signs (2000‑500 BCE); Gutenberg's press and first newspaper ads (15th‑17th c.); the first advertising agency (Volney B. Palmer, 1842); radio ads (1922) and TV's golden age (1950s‑60s); the creative revolution (Bernbach, Ogilvy, 1960s); digital birth: banner ad (1994) and search ads (Google AdWords, 2000); social media advertising (Facebook Ads, 2007); programmatic and real‑time bidding (2010s); rise of influencer marketing and mobile‑first; and the 2020s with AI‑generated creative, attention measurement, and cookieless targeting.
